home.headline: SMS campaigns without the noise.
home.sub: Build a linear sequence, pick your audience, send or schedule. Built for small ecommerce teams who want speed over complexity.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your business account.
login.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use email.

profileSettings.loadFailed: Could not load profile. Please close and try again.
profileSettings.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
profileSettings.generalSubtitle: How your business appears in recipients' inboxes.
profileSettings.displayNameHint: Shown as the sender name in your recipients' inbox.
profileSettings.replyEmailHint: Where replies from recipients will be delivered.
profileSettings.businessSubtitle: Your business name and logo are shown in email campaigns.
profileSettings.logoHint: PNG, JPG or WebP · max 2 MB
profileSettings.securitySubtitle: Manage your account security and data.
profileSettings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data — campaigns, audiences, and messages. This action cannot be undone.
profileSettings.deleteConfirmPrompt: To confirm, type your email address:
profileSettings.deleteFailed: Could not delete account. Please try again.

domainSetup.title: Set up your business identity
domainSetup.subtitle: Tell us your business name — this is shown to your email recipients in their inbox.
domainSetup.nameHint: This is how your business appears in the recipient's inbox.
domainSetup.replyEmailHint: If recipients reply to your campaign, their reply will go here.
domainSetup.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

audienceHub.title: Audience
audienceHub.subtitle: Separate lists for SMS (phone numbers) and email campaigns.
audienceHub.phonesDesc: Lists of phone numbers in E.164 format for SMS campaigns.
audienceHub.emailsDesc: Lists of subscriber emails for email campaigns.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: SMS and email campaigns. Analytics and results for each campaign.
campaigns.bannerCampaignInsert: Could not start a new campaign. Try signing out and back in. If it persists, contact support.
campaigns.bannerNoProfile: Your account profile is missing. Try signing out and back in, or contact support.
campaigns.pausedSystemTooltip: This campaign was paused automatically because errors were detected. It will resume when the problem is resolved.
campaigns.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
campaigns.pendingApprovalHint: We will notify you when the campaign is reviewed.
campaigns.readyToLaunchHint: You can start the campaign when you are ready — use the button in Actions.
campaigns.rejectedPleaseEdit: Please edit your campaign and submit again.
campaigns.startQueued: Campaign started. Sending runs in the background — open Monitor for live progress.
campaigns.startPartialSend: Campaign started. Sent {sent} email(s); some messages failed:
campaigns.startNoEmailsSent: Campaign started but no emails were sent. Open live results to see errors, or check RESEND_API_KEY and your sender address.

monitor.rateNote: Sends are limited to about 50 SMS per minute per campaign.
monitor.empty: No matching messages for this campaign yet.
monitor.showing: {loaded} of {total} in this filter (load more if available).
monitor.pollPausedPaging: Auto-refresh is limited to the counters while scrolled/paged older rows — close and reopen or change filter to refresh the latest page.

wizard.addMessage: Add message text or a link for at least one step
wizard.finalizeFailed: Could not submit campaign for approval
wizard.title: New campaign
wizard.channelSmsDesc: Direct text messages to your contacts.
wizard.channelEmailDesc: Pick an email list, refine recipients, then generate a campaign email with AI.
wizard.step2Hint: Choose a phone list. Upload or create lists under Audience.
wizard.linkShortenWhy: A short link uses fewer characters in your SMS (often under the 160 limit), looks cleaner to recipients, and lets you track clicks in campaign analytics.
wizard.linkShortenInfoBody: If your link is long, use our shortener—you'll have more room for your SMS text.
wizard.reviewModerationHint: When you create the campaign, it is sent to our team for approval before any messages go out.
wizard.compliance: Compliance: ensure recipients have opted in to SMS marketing. This MVP does not manage legal consent for you.

phones.title: Phone numbers
phones.subtitle: E.164 recommended (e.g. +15551234567). Used for SMS campaigns.
phones.addNumbersHint: Paste CSV lines or one number per row.
phones.pastePhones: Paste one phone number per line

emailWizard.step2Hint: Choose an email list. Create lists under Audience → Email addresses.
emailWizard.step3Hint: Send to everyone in the list, or pick specific addresses (pagination keeps the list manageable).
emailWizard.entireAudienceCount: This list has {count} contact(s). Everyone will receive the campaign.
emailWizard.step4Hint: Choose the type of email that best matches your goal. Each type has a purpose-built template.
emailWizard.selectTemplate: Select an email type to continue.
emailWizard.template_promotional_desc: Drive immediate purchases with a bold offer and product highlights.
emailWizard.template_product_launch_desc: Introduce a new product, explain its value, and build excitement.
emailWizard.template_seasonal_desc: Leverage time pressure and seasonal context (Black Friday, holidays, etc.).
emailWizard.template_discount_coupon_desc: Convert fast with a prominent coupon code and clear redemption steps.
emailWizard.senderSectionHint: Saved to your account for all future campaigns. Use an address on a domain you have verified with your email provider.
emailWizard.senderEmailInvalid: Enter a valid business sender email.
emailWizard.subjectLinePh: e.g. Our biggest sale of the year is here
emailWizard.heroImageHint: Optional. Replaces the solid hero color with your photo and a dark overlay so white text stays readable. PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF, max 3MB.
emailWizard.heroImageEmpty: No background image — the hero uses your theme color.
emailWizard.heroImageOnFile: Background image added to the hero banner.
emailWizard.heroHeadlinePh: e.g. Up to 50% off — this weekend only
emailWizard.supportingLinePh: e.g. Free shipping on orders over $50
emailWizard.countdownTextPh: e.g. ⏰ Only 48 hours left — don't miss out!
emailWizard.offerDescriptionPh: Describe the deal in a sentence or two…
emailWizard.launchHeadlinePh: e.g. The shoe that changes everything
emailWizard.storyPh: A sentence or two about what makes this product special…
emailWizard.benefitsPh: e.g. You'll run faster with less fatigue
emailWizard.couponHeroHeadlinePh: e.g. Your exclusive discount is here
emailWizard.redemptionStepsPh: e.g. Add items to your cart
emailWizard.noProductsYet: No products added yet. Click '+ Add product' to add one.
emailWizard.templateDataRequired: Fill in the required fields before building the email.
emailWizard.checkImprovementsTooltip: Analyze this email's content to reduce the risk of landing in spam or promotions folders.

emailReady.intro: Review the generated email and add your logo if needed, then submit the campaign for approval.
emailReady.senderBlockHint: To change it, go back to the wizard (email step). It is stored on your profile.
emailReady.senderMissing: No sender address on file — go back to the wizard to add your business sender email.
emailReady.senderRequired: Add your business sender email in the campaign wizard before submitting.
emailReady.title: Email ready
emailReady.subtitle: Desktop and mobile previews use your saved HTML. Open in a new tab to click through to your landing page.
emailReady.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF (max 2MB). It is saved on your profile and appears at the top of future emails.
emailReady.logoOnFile: A logo is on file for your account.
emailReady.logoMissing: No logo yet — the preview shows a placeholder until you upload one.
emailReady.startNow: Start now (queue sends when you launch)
emailReady.finalizeFailed: Could not submit campaign for approval
emailReady.submitModerationHint: Submitting sends the campaign to our team for content review. You will be notified when it is approved or if changes are needed.
emailReady.emailCompliance: Compliance: send only to people who opted in to marketing email. This app does not track consent for you.
emailReady.themeHint: Pick a color scheme for your email. The preview updates instantly.
emailReady.fontHint: Pick a font for headings and body text. The preview updates instantly.
emailReady.emphasisHint: Bold keeps strong headlines and buttons (default). Balanced softens weights for a calmer look while keeping hierarchy.
emailReady.layoutHint: Choose a visual arrangement for the email. Each layout changes the structure, hero, and card style.

emails.title: Emails
emails.subtitle: Email lists for email campaigns. Use the campaign wizard to send AI-generated messages.
emails.addHint: One email per line (or separated by comma).

analytics.liveHint: Results update automatically every few seconds while the campaign is running.
analytics.noLinks: This campaign has no shortened links.
analytics.salesEmpty: No conversions recorded yet. Add the tracking snippet to your store checkout.

adminModeration.title: Campaign approvals
adminModeration.subtitle: Approve or reject campaigns waiting for review. After approval, the business owner starts the send from their dashboard.
adminModeration.noteRequired: Enter a reason for the user.

google.buildUrlFailed: Could not build sign-in URL. Try again.
google.noRedirect: No redirect URL returned. Check Supabase Google provider settings.
